title: AI scientist, DNA editors, AI NPCs, new Qwen, open-source robots, new video editors: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search covers a broad range of AI developments including new language models (Qwen 3.7), DNA editing tools (Carbon), robotics frameworks (LeRobot, CogOmniControl), audio/video generation (Stable Audio 3, WavFlow), and agent systems (Co-scientist). The video highlights emerging trends across multiple AI domains from research institutions and companies like Bytedance, Google DeepMind, and Stability AI.
